title: Jim Mech
description: Adds a powerful Mech to the game!
body:
![Three mechs stand under the text: "JIM MECH"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66b6c9d3737208e59b0ad083c5eb7b38d9120553.png)

**This mod requires [geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) to run.**

_**Notice:** This mod was made as a one-off for an ItsJim modding competition, thus it likely will not receive any updates and you may experience bugs while playing. sorry :(_

# Description
Have you ever wanted an incredibly versatile mech that could both protect you from danger and manipulate the world? Well look no further, for the Jim Mech can do both of these things!

Using an advanced manipulation technique known as a mechanical arm, this mech allows you to instantly grab blocks and transport them (it even works on bedrock!), or to throw them at your enemies. Perhaps you prefer combat, and using the latest innovations in offensive technology, we've been able to transform one of the mech's arms into a machine gun, allowing quick and easy access to destruction. If you simply want transport, this mech also comes equipped with a jetpack, allowing you to soar to the skies!

## Usage
![An image showing the crafting recipe for the mech. Two emeralds in the top corners, two netherite blocks in the center corners, two neterite ingots in the bottom corners. One glass pane in the top middle, one nether star in the exact center, and one fire charge in the bottom center slot.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a49b9fc47e8545f467c07653603f7cae4fd140b.png)

After crafting the mech, simply `right click` on the ground to place it down. If you'd like to pick it back up, `shift right click` on it.

Once it is placed, `right click` it to enter.

While in the mech, press `left click` while looking at a block to pick it up. You can then press `left click` again to put the block down somewhere else or hold and then release `right click` to throw the block.

While in the mech, hold `right click` to shoot using the machine gun.

While in the mech, hold `space` to activate the thrusters and fly.
